philippines.title: 4 nabbed in illegal gun sale in Cotabato province — CIDG
philippines.description:
COTABATO CITY — Four alleged gunrunners were arrested during a buy-bust operation conducted by police in Barangay Villarica, Midsayap, Cotabato province, on May 30, an official said Sunday. Lt. Col. Niño Lope Briones, acting regional chief of the Criminal Investigation and Detection Group–Regional Field Unit–Bangsamoro Autonomous Region (CIDG-RFUBAR), said the buy-bust operation under “Oplan Paglalansag Omega” was carried out in coordination with other police units after a suspect known as “Basti” agreed to sell long firearms to an undercover police agent. “They were immediately arrested after they handed over the rifles,” Briones said. READ: Soldier, cop girlfriend busted in illegal […]...
Keep on reading: 4 nabbed in illegal gun sale in Cotabato province — CIDG

philippines.title: Fuel prices seen to drop by up to P10/liter on June 2
philippines.description:
MANILA – Fuel prices are projected to drop by as much as PHP10 per liter in the coming week, following consecutive increases in recent weeks, partly due to optimism over a possible outcome in peace negotiations between the United States and Iran. Citing price developments during the first four trading days this week, Department of Energy […]...
Keep on reading: Fuel prices seen to drop by up to P10/liter on June 2

philippines.title: Pagadian City road crash kills passenger, hurts teen driver
philippines.description:
PAGADIAN CITY, Zamboanga del Sur — A woman died while a 17-year-old male driver was injured after their motorcycle collided with a pickup truck along Maharlika Highway in Barangay Balintawak here at around 6:50 p.m. on Saturday, May 30. Police investigators said the victims were traveling from New Road Dao toward Barangay Buenavista, while the pickup truck was heading in the opposite direction from Dinas, Zamboanga del Sur, toward Barangay Banale here. READ: 2 dead, 1 hurt in highway collision in Zamboanga del Sur The accident occurred in front of a gasoline station. The pickup truck, driven by a 69-year-old […]...
Keep on reading: Pagadian City road crash kills passenger, hurts teen driver

energy.title: China’s Oil Buying Pause Won’t Last Forever
energy.description: China has been cited as an example of a country that has managed to insulate itself relatively well against oil crises. With over a billion barrels in estimated inventories before the war in the Middle East started, China was the poster child of forward planning in energy security. But this could change, and if it does, it would make an already severe crisis even worse. Kpler sounded the alarm about that prospect earlier this month, reporting that Chinese refiners have reduced their purchases of oil from overseas because of the price surge caused…

energy.title: America’s LNG Boom Is Real — But China Is Planning Beyond It
energy.description: The Iran war has handed the United States a rare opportunity: a new dawn of energy dominance in an increasingly fractured world. With coordinated US-Israeli strikes disrupting the Strait of Hormuz from late February, roughly 20% of global LNG supply has been stripped from the market since early March. Prices have surged across Asia and Europe. And into that vacuum, American gas has flowed. The numbers speak for themselves. US LNG exports to Asia jumped sharply in April, with nearly a quarter of all American cargoes heading to a region that simply…
